_doc: Layering-smoke config (the check-agent-context engine). Verifies every agent reads the SAME intact root rulebook. Edit: 'adapters' to the per-agent pointer files you actually have; 'agentBudgets' if you add an agent. rootRulesFile/canonFile usually stay. Full field reference: ../_vibethink-dev-kit/setup/ADOPT-CROSS-AGENT-GOVERNANCE.md
